objective: Add runtime supervision and structured event evidence for called Claude/Codex CLI subprocesses so silent stalls and total runtime timeouts fail closed without leaving hanging workers.
scope_boundary: Add a CLI session event schema or equivalent documented contract.
Add a supervisor that can run Claude and Codex subprocesses with explicit model metadata, prompt files, stdout/stderr capture, wall timeout, silence timeout, process-group cleanup, and bounded retry.
Wire scripts/codex-review-template.sh claude mode through the supervisor.
Add direct claude -p guard coverage for scripts/workflows.
Add fake CLI tests for success, nonzero failure, silent stall, intermittent output, total timeout, retry once, and max-retry halt.
out_of_scope: Requiring packet dispatch to consume CLI session events.
Requiring PR templates or closeout hooks to consume CLI session events.
Replacing package handoff schemas or packet schemas.
research_summary: Issue #444 addresses the observed failure mode where a called Claude worker runs silently for minutes and needs a governed termination/retry path. Existing Codex wrappers have preflight and failure logging, but the direct Claude specialist path in scripts/codex-review-template.sh has no silence supervision or structured session event. This slice adds that runtime evidence surface without changing downstream repos.

sprints.name: CLI session supervisor
sprints.goal: Create a supervised subprocess path for called model CLIs and route the weak Claude review path through it.
tasks: Define the CLI session event schema.
Implement the supervisor with stdout/stderr capture, process-group cleanup, wall timeout, silence timeout, and bounded retry.
Route scripts/codex-review-template.sh claude through the supervisor with explicit Claude model pin and prompt file.
Add or update guard coverage so direct claude -p script/workflow calls are refused unless allowlisted.
Add fake CLI tests covering the required subprocess outcomes.
Record issue #444 evidence and run deterministic gates.
acceptance_criteria: A governed CLI session event schema or documented event contract exists for called Claude/Codex subprocesses.

The supervisor can run called Claude worker sessions with explicit model, permission mode or tools, no session persistence, max turns, wall timeout, silence timeout, stdout/stderr capture, process-group cleanup, and bounded retry behavior.
scripts/codex-review-template.sh claude mode uses the supervisor instead of direct claude -p piping.
Codex compatibility is preserved through the same supervisor interface or documented upgrade path.
Silent stalls emit operator-visible status, record idle_timeout evidence, terminate the process group, and do not leave hanging workers.
Total runtime timeouts record total_timeout evidence and terminate the process group.
Retry behavior is capped to one relaunch when an explicit retry prompt is provided.
Fake CLI tests cover success, nonzero failure, silent stall, intermittent output, total timeout, retry once, and max-retry halt.
Direct claude -p script/workflow calls are guarded unless allowlisted.

specialist_reviews.focus: CLI session supervisor implementation, wrapper wiring, guard coverage, and fake CLI tests.
specialist_reviews.summary: Bounded Sonnet worker handoff was attempted with claude-sonnet-4-6 and terminated after prolonged silence with no implementation edits. Codex implemented and QA'd the bounded scope under the material deviation rule.

alternate_model_review.summary: Codex QA completed after the required Sonnet worker handoff stalled with no edits. The review is recorded as the issue #444 cross-review artifact.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Implement governance-only CLI subprocess supervision, Claude review wrapper routing, direct Claude-call guard coverage, fake CLI tests, issue evidence, validation, review, and closeout for issue #444.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run Codex QA, focused validation, Opus cross-review or documented availability fallback, Local CI Gate, closeout, PR, and automerge if green.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: Supervisor tests prove silent stalls and total timeouts terminate child process groups.
Claude review template no longer calls claude -p directly.
Event schema includes handoff_package_ref and retry metadata.
Local CI Gate passes before merge.

material_deviation_rules: If packet/PR/closeout consumers need CLI session events, create follow-up issues instead of expanding this slice.
If downstream repos need propagation, create downstream issues instead of editing them here.
If Sonnet worker tooling is unavailable or hangs, record the attempt and continue with Codex QA plus Opus cross-review.
approved_by: operator approval: no HITL, loop remaining child issues
